## [1.1.1](https://github.com/xob0t/morphe-patches/compare/v1.0.1...v1.1.1) (2026-05-09)


### Features

* fix and expand Avito ad removal
* add generic privacy patches
* add Avito privacy analytics patch
* add optional Avito Avi bottom tab patch


### Bug Fixes

* build Android-ready patch bundle with dex entries
